title: Project Board Conversion - Incorrect Status Column
excerpt: I converted a standard Monday board to a project board.  In the process, I selected the wrong status column.   That status column is used to display the project progress but it is showing incorrect data.  How do I change…

posts.author: aaron.hymas (Aaron Hymas)
posts.cookedHtml: I converted a standard Monday board to a project board. In the process, I selected the wrong status column. That status column is used to display the project progress but it is showing incorrect data. How do I change the columns it pulls the status from to make the Overview dashboard display correct information?

posts.author: LKat (Laura Katterhenry)
posts.cookedHtml: Easy peasy! Go to the project board, click the 3 dot menu at the top right, then go to More actions, then Update project structure. You’ll be able to re-select the project’s status and timeline columns.

posts.author: aaron.hymas (Aaron Hymas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for that information but it appears that option doesn’t exist, unless I am looking in the wrong place.

image626×601 47.8 KB

posts.author: LKat (Laura Katterhenry)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possibly a setting in the Manage project components option in the menu? It’s weird that we have different options - are you an admin on your monday account?

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: May be a beta feature, in gradual release, or locked behind enterprise tier.

posts.author: aaron.hymas (Aaron Hymas)
posts.cookedHtml: Nothing like that under Manage project components. I did check and don’t have full administrator access to Monday, just ownership permissions to the workspace.
